description: Plugin-distributed hooks for technical-seo-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 4 mechanically-detectable technical-SEO smells in SEO-shaped files (.txt/.xml/.html/.htm/.md) — (1) a path that is both robots.txt Disallow-ed and carries a noindex/canonical (the directive is never read), (2) a redirect chain or a 302 used for what reads as a permanent move, (3) an HTTP 200 returned alongside not-found/no-results text (a likely soft 404), (4) a quoted FID metric (replaced by INP — dates the analysis). Set SEO_SMELLS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
